title: The Now Designs — Websites built for clarity and action
description: A design studio creating distinctive websites for growing businesses.

issues.title: The page locks up while loading
issues.impact: Buttons and menus can feel unresponsive exactly when a visitor tries them.
issues.fix: Split heavy scripts and defer nonessential code.

issues.title: Some text is harder to read
issues.impact: Low contrast can hide important messaging from some visitors.
issues.fix: Raise contrast while preserving the brand palette.
